title: rumohra callipteris
intro: Rumohra callipteris is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the autumn fern due to its unique ability to change color with the seasons. The medicinal properties of Rumohra callipteris lie in its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are said to help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Rumohra callipteris typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
